news.headline: Hankey Group launches pioneering Bitcoin Crypto Lending Program; allows crypto holders to use Bitcoin as collateral for real estate & vehicles financing.
news.summary: Hankey Group has recently introduced a groundbreaking Bitcoin Crypto Lending Program in Los Angeles. This initiative aims to offer new financial avenues to potential buyers of real estate and highline vehicles by leveraging Bitcoin. Through the Crypto Finance Program, individuals holding cryptocurrency can utilize their Bitcoin holdings as collateral to secure complete financing for the purchase of real estate or luxury vehicles. This eliminates the necessity for substantial upfront cash payments, such as the standard 20% down payment usually required in traditional real estate transactions.

news.headline: Razzlekhan releases music video before $11B Bitcoin theft prison term. Discusses new single in interview.
news.summary: Prior to her incarceration for a $11 billion Bitcoin theft, Heather "Razzlekhan" Morgan discusses her latest music release and music video with Decrypt.

news.headline: The high cost of video game production is a significant challenge for developers, with budgets often exceeding millions of dollars.
Ataccama recognized by Gartner for Data and Analytics Governance. Ataccama ONE platform supports data governance. Included in first Gartner Magic Quadrant. (Characters: 162)
news.summary: Ataccama, a company specializing in AI-powered data management, recently introduced the Ataccama ONE data trust platform designed to aid enterprises in implementing effective data governance practices. This new platform is intended to enhance data management capabilities and ensure compliance with regulatory standards. On January 10, 2025, the company made headlines by being featured in the inaugural edition of the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data and Analytics Governance. This recognition signifies Ataccama's growing prominence in the industry and its commitment to providing innovative solutions for data governance.

news.headline: European Commission approves Synopsys' acquisition of Ansys in Phase 1. Positive move for competition. Statement issued by Synopsys.
news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California on January 10, 2025, Synopsys released a statement regarding the European Commission's approval of their acquisition of Ansys in Phase 1. The statement conveyed their satisfaction with the EC's decision, considering it a significant milestone in their pro-competitive transaction. This development showcases the successful progression of the acquisition proposal between the two companies.

news.headline: Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau's popularity declining rapidly.
48 counterparties take $178.8 bln at the Fed reverse repo operartion.
Austin-based Overhaul receives $55M in funding from Springcoast Partners to drive AI innovation and growth.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on January 10, 2025, Overhaul, a prominent company specializing in active supply chain risk management and intelligence, revealed that it has secured $55 million in equity funding. This financing round was spearheaded by Springcoast Partners, a growth equity firm known for its focus on supporting the growth of businesses.

news.headline: Only 0.4% of Pump.fun traders hit $10,000 profit on Solana meme coins, making 294 millionaires.
news.summary: 294 individuals have become millionaires through Pump.fun, representing only 0.4% of total wallets. These lucky investors have generated profits of at least $10,000 each from meme coins.

news.headline: Only 0.4% of Pump.fun traders achieved over $10,000, making 294 millionaires on meme coins.
news.summary: Pump.fun has created 294 millionaires up to this point, representing only 0.4% of all wallets that have gained $10,000 from meme coins.

news.headline: Sanctions from US on Russia's energy hit hard, escalating tensions. Important move amid growing conflict.
French Ministers are to make budget proposals to the PM on Saturday.
Julie DeLorenzo named Director of Community Relations at Boise Hunter Homes, brings years of experience to the role.
news.summary: In Eagle, Idaho, Boise Hunter Homes has appointed Julie DeLorenzo as the new Director of Community Relations. This strategic decision emphasizes the company's commitment to community relations and corporate responsibility. With extensive experience as an Idaho Realtor and a history of volunteering and serving on boards for local non-profits and governmental bodies, DeLorenzo brings valuable expertise to enhance Boise Hunter Homes' community engagement and expansion efforts.

news.headline: Cabot Corp. to reveal Q1 2025 operating results soon.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, its lowest level in over a year. The economy added 531,000 jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations and marking a significant improvement. The labor force participation rate also saw an increase to 61.7%. These numbers demonstrate a promising trend in the country's economic recovery, showing positive signs for the job market. The strong job growth has been attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending and a boost in sectors such as hospitality and retail. The data suggests a potential shift towards a more robust and stable employment landscape in the months ahead.

news.headline: Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: OBK) to release Q4 and full-year 2024 results on Jan 22; conference call on Jan 23 at 8:00 am CT. Hosted by Drake Mills, William J. Wallace IV, and Lance Hall.
news.summary: On Jan. 10, 2025, Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: OBK) announced that it will release its Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on Jan. 22, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call led by Drake Mills and other key figures will be held on Jan. 23, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET) to discuss the results. Origin is the financial holding company for Origin Bank.

news.headline: $48M EPA Thriving Communities Grant Program begins for local entities in Pacific Southwest to address environmental and health challenges.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on January 10, 2025, the Liberty Hill Foundation and its partners revealed the initiation of award submissions for the EPA Thriving Communities Grantmaking Program. This program is set to allocate $48 million in grants to support environmental protection efforts.

news.headline: FanDuel and Flutter donate $250,000 to LA wildfire relief efforts. Company in LA for 25 years. (100)
news.summary: One company has been a longstanding member of the Los Angeles business community for a quarter of a century and is dedicated to providing support to its impacted employees and contributing to broader relief efforts. This commitment was reinforced in a recent announcement made on January 10, 2025, in New York and Los Angeles. FanDuel, operating under its parent company Flutter Entertainment with the ticker symbol NYSE: FLUT, along with other partner organizations, expressed their dedication to this cause.

news.headline: Wall Street falls due to strong jobs report, with 256,000 jobs in December, unemployment rate at 4.1%. Oil rallies to $76 amid Russian sanctions.
news.summary: Following the funeral of former President Jimmy Carter, Wall Street experienced significant selling pressure due to various economic developments. The U.S. economy added 256,000 jobs in December, surpassing expectations, with the unemployment rate dropping to 4.1%. This strong labor market data led to a delay in rate cut expectations, now fully priced in only by September 2025. Additionally, oil prices surged over 3% to $76 per barrel after the Biden administration imposed stricter sanctions on Russian oil exports. Rising interest rate concerns and inflation uncertainty led to a dip in equities, with consumer survey data showing five-year inflation expectations at 3.3%, the highest since June 2008.

news.headline: Virion Therapeutics finishes first 2 cohorts of Phase 1b trial for Hepatitis B treatment, 27 patients dosed with VRON-0200.
news.summary: Virion Therapeutics, LLC, a clinical-stage biotechnology company based in Philadelphia, announced on January 10, 2025, that 27 patients suffering from Chronic Hepatitis B Virus infection have received a dose of VRON-0200. The treatment was administered either as a single injection (Prime) or a combination of Prime and Boost intramuscularly.

Check out Project Liberty's TikTok bid: Giving power to the people.

US Baker Hughes Total Rig Count Actual 584 (Forecast -, Previous 589)
Iktos and Cube Biotech team up for AI drug discovery, focusing on Amylin Receptor with advanced protein technologies.
news.summary: A collaboration between Iktos and Cube Biotech is set to harness Iktos's AI-driven drug discovery platform and Cube Biotech's cutting-edge protein technologies to create new agonists of the Amylin Receptor. The partnership, based in PARIS and MONHEIM, Germany, was announced on Jan. 10, 2025. Iktos, renowned for its expertise in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Robotics, will be joining forces with Cube Biotech to potentially revolutionize drug development in this field.

news.headline: Bitcoin thief turned rapper, Razzlekhan, releases music video before serving time for $11 billion heist. Interview with Decrypt.
news.summary: Heather "Razzlekhan" Morgan, facing imprisonment for a $11 billion Bitcoin theft, speaks to Decrypt about her latest music release, including a new single and music video.

news.headline: Trump Middle East envoy Witkoff met Qatar's PM on Friday to discuss a Gaza ceasefire and hostage negotiations — Source briefed on the visit.
Analyst suggests altseason hindered by stagnant inflows; Ki Young Ju notes altcoin market operates as zero-sum battleground.
news.summary: According to market analyst and CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju, the Altcoin markets are currently characterized as a player versus player game with a zero-sum outcome.

news.headline: Strong US labor market data causes bearish response in crypto markets; Bitcoin drops $2,000 to $94,000.
news.summary: Surprising labor market figures have caused a downturn in crypto markets, with Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) hovering near $94,000. The recent report revealed that the U.S. added 256,000 payrolls in December, leading to a surge in bond yields and a decline in Bitcoin's price. Despite briefly rising from $92,000 to $95,000, Bitcoin quickly dropped over $2,000 due to the unexpected strength of the data. Crypto trader Jelle highlighted the sudden change in market sentiment, describing the situation as "stairs up, elevator down." This news showcases how job data impacted the market's behavior.

news.headline: Innovative technologies like bio-wearables and AI are transforming chronic disease management globally: Study by BCC Research.
news.summary: Cutting-edge technologies are transforming the way chronic diseases are managed. A recent report by BCC Research reveals that these advancements include bio-wearables, digital therapeutics, and AI-driven solutions. Released on Jan. 10, 2025, the study titled "Chronic Disease Management: Therapeutics, Device Technologies" highlights the impact of these innovations. In Boston, significant developments are observed in the healthcare sector as these technologies pave the way for more efficient and effective treatment strategies. This report underscores the importance of embracing these emerging technologies to enhance patient care.

news.headline: Biden to give remarks on Russian energy and the US economy later today.
Air Wisconsin shifts focus to Essential Air Service & Charter Ops, owned by Harbor Diversified, Inc. (OTCMKTS: HRBR).
news.summary: Appleton, Wisconsin - On January 10, 2025, Air Wisconsin Airlines LLC, a regional air carrier and subsidiary of Harbor Diversified, Inc. (OTCMKTS: HRBR), revealed plans for a strategic shift towards prioritizing Essential Air Service. This decision signifies a significant repositioning within the industry.

news.headline: Vertical Relevance attains AWS Premier Tier status in APN, solidifying partnership.
news.summary: Vertical Relevance has recently reached the prestigious Premier Tier status within the AWS Partner Network (APN). This milestone signifies the company's exceptional standing within the APN ecosystem.

news.headline: Tech employment saw an uptick at the end of the year with tech unemployment rate dropping to 2%, according to CompTIA analysis.
news.summary: The tech unemployment rate has dropped to 2% in Downers Grove, Illinois, as of January 10, 2025. The latest job data indicates a rise in tech hiring, leading to this decline in unemployment. CompTIA, a prominent vendor-neutral information provider in the world, reported these findings.

news.headline: Should you sell Rachel Reeves shares? Ailbhe Rea explores this question in Bloomberg's latest article.
Sobi's 2024 revenue surpasses estimates at SEK 26,000 M, showing 19% growth.
news.summary: Swedish Orphan Biovitrum AB (publ) (Sobi®) (STO:SOBI) revealed increased revenue for the full year 2024, surpassing previous expectations. With total revenue hitting approximately SEK 26,000 M, the company experienced a strong growth rate of about 19% at constant levels.

news.headline: Kimberly Lee Minor partners with BroadView Talent Partners to enhance retail leadership, focus on diversity and growth.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Kimberly Lee Minor, a seasoned professional in the retail industry, and executive search firm BroadView Talent Partners based in Fairfield, Conn. Their collaboration aims to enhance leadership within the sector by identifying optimal C-suite leaders for retail organizations. Through this partnership, they will focus on accessing a diverse pool of skilled candidates, improving onboarding processes, and ensuring smooth transitions. The goal is to develop a leadership team that drives growth and mirrors the diversity of the global market.

news.headline: UK assets unexpectedly soaring, find out why. Get the full scoop on the latest from Bloomberg.
Despite positive reviews from CEO Jensen Huang's CES presentation, Nvidia stock is facing a sharp weekly loss.
news.summary: Despite receiving enthusiastic reviews for CEO Jensen Huang's presentation at CES, Nvidia is facing a significant weekly loss in stock value. This decline comes amidst positive reception to the annual event, indicating a disconnect between investor sentiment and public opinion. The company's stock is currently tracking towards a notable decrease, highlighting a potential contrast between perception and financial performance.

news.headline: Celebrate Lunar New Year at Bellevue Collection with performances and activities on Jan. 25, 2025. Year of the Snake!
news.summary: Celebrate the start of the Year of the Snake at Bellevue Square's Center Court in Bellevue, Washington. The Bellevue Collection's annual event for this lunar year will take place on Saturday, January 25, 2025. Join in for a day filled with music, dance, and family-friendly activities to mark the occasion.

news.headline: Franklin Street Properties Corp. declares quarterly dividend of $0.01 per share payable on Feb 13, 2025 to stockholders.
news.summary: Franklin Street Properties Corp. (NYSE American: FSP) based in Wakefield, Mass., has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.01 per share of common stock for the period between October 1, 2024, and December 31, 2024. The dividend will be payable on February 13, 2025, to stockholders of record as of January 24, 2025. More information about FSP, including this press release, can be found on their website at www.fspreit.com. News regarding the company is regularly updated on their site.

news.headline: Senate Banking Committee forms first-ever subcommittee on crypto, under Sen. Tim Scott, reflecting the sector's growing influence.
news.summary: Capitol Hill is witnessing a significant development in the digital asset realm as the Senate Banking Committee is set to establish its inaugural subcommittee dedicated to cryptocurrency and blockchain technology. This move goes beyond a routine committee formation, indicating a pivotal shift in the political landscape that reflects a wider recognition and adoption of digital currencies within the U.S. governance framework.The establishment of this subcommittee, led by Senator Tim Scott (R-SC), follows the recent Republican domination of the Senate, hinting at a coordinated approach to realign policies with the changing financial landscape. It demonstrates a purposeful step towards tackling the intricate issues associated with digital assets, recognizing their increasing influence both economically and politically.

news.headline: The Supreme Court signals it’s likely to uphold TikTok ban in the US.
Ex-WWE CEO Vince McMahon reaches a settlement with S.E.C. regarding undisclosed payments to two women, one accusing him of assault.
news.summary: Two women, one of whom accused the former chief executive of World Wrestling Entertainment, were paid by him.

news.headline: Trump Org releases ethics pledge for President-Elect's second term - includes outside ethics lawyer & limits to financial access.
news.summary: The recent measures closely resemble arrangements made during the president's initial term, which involve the hiring of an independent ethics attorney and restricting Mr. Trump's ability to obtain in-depth financial data.

news.headline: Stock market plunges 650 points as job growth in December surpasses expectations, causing major sell-off in leading stocks.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a significant downturn with the Dow Jones dropping 650 points following a better-than-expected job growth report for December. This sudden selling spree shook the market, causing several leading stocks to indicate sell signals.

news.headline: MultiPlan and J2 Health partner to enhance network services and analytics, improving healthcare affordability and quality.
news.summary: In New York, MultiPlan Corporation (NYSE: MPLN), a prominent healthcare technology and data solutions provider, has recently entered into a partnership with J2 Health, a cloud-based software company specializing in enhancing provider network performance. The agreement aims to bolster MultiPlan's network optimization strategy by offering customized solutions and improving resource efficiency. This collaboration is expected to drive down healthcare costs and enhance quality and transparency within the industry.

news.headline: Trump avoids punishment in hush money case.
Latest jobs report: worse than expected, unemployment rises to 6.1%, only 266K new jobs added, not good news for Trump.
Unexpected rise in December employment figures is undermining prospects for a rate cut by the Fed in the first half.
